title: eval-judge harness canonical types
description: Authoritative shapes for the eval-judge harness's domain entities. See docs/evaljudge/specs/01-domain-model.md. Status: Draft — the harness is not yet built; this schema is the build target.

Slug.description: Stable lowercase identifier, kebab or double-underscore separated. Re-declared per-app (not shared with the benchmark schema) until two apps genuinely share it — see 05-architecture.md.

RecordId.description: Generated record id of the form <prefix>_<uuid7>.

RunStatus.description: Outcome of a run-stage invocation. Only `completed` is judged; the others short-circuit to a NOT_RUN verdict.

ChangeKind.description: How a file in EvalRun.file_changes was affected by the run.

Band.description: Conformance band of a score, reusing the benchmark calibration bands.

Verdict.description: Derived per-case outcome. PASS/FAIL come from the judge score vs PASS_THRESHOLD; NOT_RUN comes from a non-completed run.

SeedFile.description: A file seeded into the working directory before the skill runs (an EvalCase.files entry).

FileChange.description: One observed file-system effect of a run, from diffing the working directory.

contents.description: New file contents for created/modified; null for deleted.

EvalCase.description: One fixture read from a skill's evals.json. Keyed naturally by (skill, id); not generated.

expectedOutput.description: The judge's authority. The run stage never receives this field.

sourcePath.description: The evals.json file this case was read from.

Telemetry.description: Optional cost/wall-clock/turn counts for a run, when the backend exposes them.

EvalRun.description: The actual behavior captured by the run stage. Carries no score.

response.description: The skill's final assistant message. Empty when the run did not complete.

EvalJudgment.description: The judge's verdict for one (expected_output, behavior) pair. Mirrors the benchmark ConformanceResult.

rawScore.description: Pre-clamp value the judge returned, kept for auditing.

EvalResult.description: The full outcome for one EvalCase: run, judgment, and derived verdict. One per case.

run.description: Null when the run never produced a judgeable behavior.

judgment.description: Null when the case was not judged (NOT_RUN).

band.description: Null for a NOT_RUN result with no score.

EvalReport.description: The aggregate over one sweep's EvalResults.

passRate.description: PASS over all results; a NOT_RUN counts against it.
